message: ci: opt into Node 24 action runtime

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ inputs:
   node-version:
     description: Node.js version to install when setup-node is true.
     required: false
-    default: "20"
+    default: "24"
   setup-pnpm:
     description: Whether to enable corepack and activate pnpm.
     required: false

@@ -8,6 +8,9 @@ on:
 permissions:
   contents: read
 
+env:
+  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: "true"
+
 jobs:
   test:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
@@ -19,7 +22,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: ./.github/actions/setup-ci-env
         with:
           setup-node: "true"
-          node-version: "20"
+          node-version: "24"
           setup-pnpm: "true"
           apt-packages: "build-essential"

@@ -14,6 +14,9 @@ on:
 permissions:
   contents: write
 
+env:
+  FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24: "true"
+
 jobs:
   goreleaser-darwin:
     runs-on: macos-latest
